---

## Use Case

Describe the problem or use case this feature would address. Why do you need this feature?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you'd like this feature to work.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, configuration examples, or references about the feature request here.
